description: The next steps artifact is the output of the `next` command. It is a complete, ready-to-use task brief for the following workflow iteration.

fields.title: Short label used in the session history index
fields.goal: Precise, testable statement of what must be true when the task is done
fields.context: Current repo/dataset/experiment state relevant to the task
fields.constraints: Numbered list of hard constraints, carried forward and updated from the review
fields.inputs: Files or artifacts the executor will need, with paths
fields.outputs: Files or artifacts that must exist when done, with paths
fields.notes: Anything a fresh executor needs to understand that is not captured above
fields.rationale: Why this is the right next task and what it unblocks

note: The next_steps.md artifact is free-form Markdown. When the `next --execute` path is used, the output should be copy-pasted directly into automation/state/task_brief.md to start the next loop.
